name: Antoine Park
description: Antoine Park is a place to play pickleball in Port Washington, WI. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Athletic Performance Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Athletic Performance Sports Complex in Cedarburg, WI! There are 18 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights.
fees:
Fee required — Stop in fee $10
Punchcard $70 for 10
Court reservation $35 per hour

name: Cedarburg Community Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Cedarburg Community Gym in Cedarburg, WI! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts can be reserved.

name: Elite Sports Club - Mequon
description:
Membership to the club is required to reserve a court.  

There are a variety of pickleball events held which are available for non-members.  Refer to the website for those events.

name: Feith Family YMCA
description: Feith Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Washington, WI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, food, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Grady Park
description: Come play pickleball at Grady Park in Saukville, WI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
